_comment: Model registry — canonical model definitions used by both Cortex and OpenClaw via model_policy_snapshot.

models.description: High-frequency workhorse: counsel/scout/artificer/envoy orchestration, voice, intake, relay, judge, record, tend, pulse
Deep reasoning: sage agent — witness, learn, distill, focus, clst_research_report. Note: 65K context, no temperature.
Quality gate and rubric scoring: arbiter agent — quality_gate_hard, review_mentor_rubric. Strong structured output, bilingual.
Bilingual rendering: scribe agent — formal writing, zh/en split, clst_knowledge_synthesis. 128K context.
Dev/coding runs: opencode subprocess (clst_dev_project). Same model as review alias.
Text embedding for Lore similarity search and Memory semantic retrieval. 1024 dimensions, bilingual zh/en.
